Short CV

Gizem KAYA completed her undergraduate education at Istanbul University Florence Nightingale Faculty of Nursing in 2018, her master's degree at Istanbul University-Cerrahpaşa Institute of Graduate Education, Department of Nursing Management in 2020, and her doctorate at Istanbul University-Cerrahpaşa Institute of Graduate Studies, Department of Nursing Fundamentals in 2024. Between 2018 and 2019, she worked as a service nurse at Private American Hospital. Between 2019-2022, she worked as a research assistant at Biruni University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing, and between 2022-2025, at Fenerbahçe University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing. Since February 2025, she has been working as a faculty member at Üsküdar University, Department of Nursing.
